character.name: Kallius
aspects: Perfect Neural Resurrection Through Data Mastery
The Past Is Currency, I'm the Bank
I know a truth the Coalition would kill to bury.
Virtual or Not, Reality is the same to me.

drone.name: Mr. Peepers
aspects: Modular Recon Drone with Rifle Conversion

features.name: Jump Drive
features.mechanics: Base range 2 LY (+1 LY per Shift). 4 hr spool time. Fails near gravity wells (< 10× diameter distance)

features.name: Reinforced Structure
features.mechanics: +2 Structural Stress Boxes; may be taken up to Structure rating times

features.name: Point Defense System
features.description: Automated guns intercept missiles and fighters.
features.mechanics: AR bonus = Weapons Capability vs. missiles. May spend 1 FP to attack all enemies in zone (WR 0)

features.name: Electronic Counter-Measures (ECM)
features.mechanics: +2 defense vs. system attacks; may be taken up to Systems rating times

features.name: Anti-Personnel Weapons
features.mechanics: Attacks individual targets; WR = Size + 4. Treat as man-scale weapon vs. vehicles

features.name: Auto-Repair Swarm
features.description: Nanite or esper swarm conducts automatic repairs.
features.mechanics: +2 to repair rolls; can self-repair using Systems (no bonus)

features.name: Neural Interface
features.description: Direct neural control link via hostware or data-jack.
features.mechanics: +1 on all vehicle-related tests while connected

variant.name: Alpha Biosleeve
variant.description: Basic gene-fixed biosleeve with essential enhancements. Entry-level option with reduced aesthetics.

aspects.name: Gene-Fixed Biosleeve
aspects.description: Biological body with genetic health improvements

aspects.name: Unattractive
aspects.description: Basic appearance with genetic randomization flaws

variant.name: Delta Cybersleeve
variant.description: High-quality cybersleeve with optimized power systems and enhanced durability.

aspects.name: Inhuman Appearance
aspects.description: Clearly artificial appearance that affects social interactions
